channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Anyone else getting the itch? — 72 replies — 288.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Anyone else getting the itch?

Open thread • Replies: 72 • Updated: 2026-03-02 10:40 UTC

OP

The big boys'll go back up, that's guaranteed money. But some others will 10x, 100x, 1000x. I'm feelin' like it's SHIB's turn.

Early replies (first 3)

61900851
>>61899833
Checked

61900872
>>61899833
I'll just keep buying small amounts of it for the rest of my life, and see what happens.

61900948
>>61899833
i believe in shib

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61912724
>>61912644
Checked and
>You just know
Shibs on sale again!

61912911
this thread smells like india
>YES SAAAR BUY TOAD SAAR IT IS NEW DOGE SAAR

61912963
>>61912911
It’s the next shib not doge, retard

61912969
I boughted more Shib today. It ain't easy being a good boy in these doggy-dog times.

61913401
>>61912969
I never thought it would be this low again. I shlopped another 50m today too.

61913435
>>61913401
Could’ve got close to 1T toad for that price

61915673
>>61912963
Man... can you imagine the seethe on this board if this turns out to be true.

61917994
>>61913435
I made that pic kek

61917997
I had to sell all my toad though

61918166
>>61917997
What if it does what it’s intended to do and you sold? I’m not sure I could live with myself. I’d definitely rather lose the money than live with that type of fuckup for the rest of my life

61918170
Don't make last cycles mistake anon
Stay away from memecoins and bitcoin, 100% in ETH or XMR

61919529
Shib is fucking dead

61919535
>>61919529
yeah, kinda is
Thankfully i still got in early enough that there was never any chance of not making a profit despite missing out on the big gains through greed but there's nothing but a slow bleed right now and i've seen nothing that means it might pump again

61921116
Bro imagine buying that

61921137
Not today

61921143
No such thing as a free lunch

61921144
>>61899833
none of these shitcoins are gonna do big movements again retard

61921169
>>61921144
No such thing as a free lunch

61921558
Just bought some more boys, let's go

61921644
>>61901257
This already rugged.

61921961
>>61921558
Ummm based?

61921988
>>61921644
Checked and true

61922004
kek turd killer still being shilled here in 2026
lmfao nice AI pics btw

61922014
>>61922004

61922070
>>61922004
You have 2 more weeks wagie

61922078
I hope you don’t buy toad

61922734
No one is buying toad in a shib thread! Shib is going to 14x to ath and toad will go to zero. Shib already has an etf coming and toad has desperate curry flavored shills. LMAO!

61923250
>>61922734
When toad moons YOU'RE going to seethe, when toad moons YOU'RE going to rope!

61923260
>>61899833
I am in anon, people are too stupid to skip this one.
And some Doge in case the elom makes a comeback.

item.title: Sea zoomette want my BBC badly, what is your move in my shoe. — 25 replies — 99.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Sea zoomette want my BBC badly, what is your move in my shoe.

Open thread • Replies: 25 • Updated: 2026-03-02 10:37 UTC

OP

Sea zoomette want my BBC badly, what is your move in my shoe.

Early replies (first 3)

61922585
>>61922577
Start sending her money so she knows you’re serious.

61922613
>>61922585
I’m serious, diamond hardness.

61922628
>>61922613
He is right . Send her money and share your banking info letting her know that you had recurrent direct deposit set up. You know chicks love that.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61922629
>>61922577
I wouldn't end up in your shoe because I am genetically averse to race mixing

61922632
>>61922577
..and your DNA seems to be prone to getting blacked whenever female. You merely accidentally was born with a penis.

61922643
>>61922577
You type like a beta "male"

61922668
>>61922643
It's okay asian women don't care about personality at all as long as you're not asian and have money they will literally fuck you no matter what

61922673
>>61922668
I'm not Asian and I don't have money

61922674
>>61922577
>talking to a bot/scammer
>posting said screenshot on 4chan thinking you are le ebin funny man

kys retard

61922675
>>61922577
Join her Telegram crypto trading group. These people have all the best trading tips.

61922678
>>61922673
Me too but I tried dating apps using the passport mode in asia once and got like 60 matches in a day all want to suck my cock I wish I can move there soon

61922680
>>61922577
quit dicking around with those creatures before you catch mongolian VD or get your kidneys stolen.

61922687
>>61922643
he types like a jeet (because he is a jeet)

61922697
>>61922577
Got some news Romeo, she is a scammer. Pig Butcher. Classic Scam. She is going to say that her parents are from Philiphines and she want a $200 dollars dinners. She will show her world tour and her parents photos and even call you. How do I know that? She tried scam me via Boo App. She will start to talk about crypto, biz and ask if you are interest in make some money in bitcoin using "signals". She will manipulate you to open an acc on OKX and them she will say ok fill up the acc and them send your bitcoins to that wallet on this website. The website is a fake scamming crypto site. Thats Pig Butchering. I confronted her and called her a Scammer. Show her profile pic.

61922705
She sounds like the scammer.

In scams specifically, it’s often part of:
>Urgency manipulation – “Act now or you’ll lose everything.”
>Scarcity tactic – “Only 5 minutes left.” / “Last chance.”
>Crisis scam – Pretending something serious happened and demands immediate action.
>Intimidation scam – Threats involving arrest, account closure, fines, etc.
>Social engineering – Psychological manipulation to rush you before you can think.

The goal is to trigger panic so you don’t pause, verify, or consult someone else. Real institutions (banks, government agencies, major companies) rarely demand instant payment or sensitive information under extreme time pressure.

Free pussy never means consequence free.

61922711
>>61922577
you're being scammed brother

61922783
>>61922705
I have nothing to loss, I don’t own nothing and be happy, what can he scam?

61922793
>>61922783
>What can he scam
You're an indian with 80 iq

61922815
Can’t even escape the miscegenation/race-bait threads on /biz/. It’s so over.

61922912
>>61922668
>as long as you're not asian
I live in an Asian country and every Asian girl here is with an Asian guy.
>>61922678
>I tried dating apps using the passport mode in asia once
So you've never been to asia
>and got like 60 matches
They are all hookers, scammers, trannies, skits and golddiggers. Normie trad girls don't use dating sites here

61923021
>>61922912
>I live in an Asian country and every Asian girl here is with an Asian guy
Because they haven't seen the BWC yet

61923097
>>61922585
Kek - fpbp

Niggas really don't know what romance scammers are?

61923234
>>61922793
BBC stand for big black or brown cock.

61923239
>>61923234
>or brown

61923253
>>61923234
blanca too

item.title: Dominos are falling — 20 replies — 80.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Dominos are falling

Open thread • Replies: 20 • Updated: 2026-03-02 10:40 UTC

OP

Iran is blowing up oil refineries in the UAE as we speak.

Early replies (first 3)

61923034
Oil price go up: I stack.
Oil price go down: I stack.
AMA.

61923035
Two words

61923036
>>61923033
>IQ 276
Wow, I have to follow his trades, NOWW!!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61923040
Another oil nothing burger

61923047
>>61923033
This person does not know what rate hikes are lmao. The FED does not hike rates due to inflation from commodity supply issues. Rate hikes are used to cool an overheated economy, in this case the economy is already slowed plenty and hiking rates is the exact opposite of what's in the playbook right now.

61923050
>>61923047
FED doesn't cut into an oil shock either

61923058
>>61923047
it's literally not a real person, it's an AI bot account that is using an AI likeness of Younghoon Kim, the world record IQ holder, to shill XRP and other bullshit

61923070
Sum Dum Fook has spoken

61923076
Biggest oil refinery in the world hit in the UAE(Aramco). Flames go up, price go up.

61923081
>>61923076

61923083
>>61923070
I wonder if he's related to Sum Ting Wong?

61923090
>>61923033
Nothing ever happens

61923101
>>61923033
>step 10
please god i have 40k usdc on hyperliquid ready to buy, that would be 2btc

61923110
>>61923076
>llOW DOBN

61923124
>>61923034
Stack what?

61923127
>>61923033
A flash crash just flew over my house!

61923129
>>61923076
>>61923081

61923181
>>61923033
I'm not investing in oil, too many other countries which can scale up production to compensate for these losses.

61923256
>>61923124
that's a codeword for he lets black men lay ontop of his wife

61923261
>>61923033
Easiest scam ever to pull off on the internet is put "IQ: 375" and theres a subsection of ultra retards who will become cult followers

item.title: HOLY SHIT /biz/ GET IN HERE — 11 replies — 44.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
HOLY SHIT /biz/ GET IN HERE

Open thread • Replies: 11 • Updated: 2026-03-02 10:43 UTC

OP

TOWELHEADS WENT MAD
Some drones/missiles are now striking Saudi Aramcos Ras Tanura facility.

Ras Tanura is the single largest oil export terminal on the planet. It handles roughly 6.5 million barrels per day, nearly 7% of global oil supply flows through this one facility.

>>/pol/529614777

61923098
>>61923084

61923108
>>61923098
It's only a matter of time until Trump forces rate cuts and money printing to get us through all the chaos that he's started. Some of that sweet liquidity will filter into ETH to shoot it past $10k. Just wait.

>>61923108

61923121

61923222

item.title: Today is the day — 4 replies — 16.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Today is the day

Open thread • Replies: 4 • Updated: 2026-03-02 10:48 UTC

OP

Lunar eclipse is today anons. Last solar eclipse Feb 17th was the local bottom. Full moon/lunar eclipse historically marks the crash day according to Puetz cycle.

BTC is going to crash. A lot of blood. Mercury retrograde just started, we're in the crash window until March 9th. Elliott Wave confirms 3rd of 3rd wave down on SPX which drags everything with it.

And now US/Israel vs Iran is actually popping off. Late Saturday night attack and counter-attack.

Every piece is falling into place at the same time — the astro, the technicals, the geopolitics. This isn't a coincidence.
Alts are getting absolutely destroyed. This isn't random volatility.

DYOR. Not financial advice.

Early replies (first 3)

61923231
>>61923226
Bring me 1500 eth or stfu already pls! Thank you for your attention to this matter!

61923232
>>61923226
Nice Schizo rant

61923238
>>61923231
>>61923232
You can pump this in a matter of hours. Tonight will be a day to remember. Everything has brought us to today. I just want to help all those perma bulls out there and their longs. The ones that listen to shitty youtubers and crypto influencers like Raol Paul, the granny from Ark Investors, etc.

I like /biz/ and just wanna help.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61923274
>>61923238
We will see i approtiate your opinion but i dont believe in it.

item.title: Buy alts now. Anything with fully diluted supply and reasonable history will suffice. It's quite clear at this point alt… — 3 replies — 12.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Buy alts now. Anything with fully diluted supply and reasonable history will suffice. It's quite clear at this point alt…

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-03-02 10:38 UTC

OP

Buy alts now. Anything with fully diluted supply and reasonable history will suffice.

It's quite clear at this point alts are doing an XRP of last run. Most have had their relatively shallow ~85% drawdown at this point and will continue to range from here with small pumps inbetween. BTC might drop to finish it's bottom later this year but alts will likely pump before that happens to respect the Feb26 bottom. You're looking at a mild spring/summer pump. The real pump won't be until late 2027/early 2028 (frontrun again, yes). Alts will most likely just follow a gradual path until that point with no real noteable price action so if you buy now you'll need to be patient.

Fud is extremely high and nobody is buying alts. Next run is likely to be alt centric.

Early replies (first 3)

61923244
>>61923233
$1 doge?

61923248
>>61923233
ive been on this godforsaken board for nearly 10y now, and on average, 1 out of 120 predictions seem to be close to 80%. so im gonna go out on a limb and call bs because you're just hopeposting for your own peace of mind, like most do

61923254
>>61923248
Then you should know when /biz/ is screaming alts are dead and it's the end of the world you should be buying (now).

All bottom indiciators are signaling I can't help you any more than that.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

61918426

61920123

61902172

OP

61919946
just long america, they're basically the same entity

61919948

61920492
>>61919943

IZRL if you want tech focus

61920499
>>61919943
Buy American media companies. Military industrial complex (your tax money pays for Israel's defence). Palantir. Any companies ran by pedos blackmailed by the kikes. Any company promoting, or profiting from mass uncontrolled migration/negrification.

61920504
>>61919946
>just long america, they're basically the same entity
This is also true.
What reason do you have to believe the capital of the Anglo-Zionist Jewish Empire of Satan - srael is going to outperform the military golem America?

61920610
>>61919943

61920618
>>61920610
Peace in the Middle-East is finally achieved

61920699
>>61919943
>With Iran out of the way, it's going to become THE dominant regional power.
What about Turkey? In fact, once they get rid of one entity, another pops up. And public sentiment wrt Israel in the West is at an all time low.

I would honestly take the bearish bet on Israel.

61920718
>>61920699
>And public sentiment wrt Israel in the West is at an all time low.
Doesn't matter since that's only a left-wing talking point. Most rightoid governments (ie: the ones that work) are sadly Israel kike shill puppets.

61920728
>>61920618
LOL

61920732
>>61920718
Not for long

61920854
>>61920718
Whites are already minorities among the youth, and will be minorities everywhere within 10 years. Zognald has made no effort to do mass deportations, neither has any other "right wing" party in the west. They talk a bit game, but don't do shit.

jewish support is an illusion. They're pushing so hard now because they know that once the boomers are gone, they have no real friends anymore.

61920917
>>61920699
>And public sentiment wrt Israel in the West is at an all time low.
Kek cope. The public has the attention span of a mouse. The 'Next Thing' will come. The schools will keep explaining the horrible sufferings of the Jews and all heads of state will bow their heads on tv come memorial day. Everyone knows only racist chuds think there is something wrong with Israel standing up for itself.

61920920
>>61920718

you zoomers are retarded
economies have almost always performed better under liberal governments.

61920983

61920986
>>61920917

Lmao, you dumb fucking clown. You've been spoiled with a generation of boomer slaves that sit down and have laser beam focus on anything their told to focus on. Boomers bawled over MUH HECKIN POOR JEWIES because whites have a high level of empathy that is easily manipulated.

Browns do not focus, and they do not have empathy. Pity for the rat heeb is gone with the boomers.

61920998
>>61920854

61920999

item.title: Hyperliquid >decentralized perp and spot exchange >trading silver, gold and crude oil on weekends during a war >genius l… — 28 replies — 3.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Hyperliquid >decentralized perp and spot exchange >trading silver, gold and crude oil on weekends during a war >genius l…

Open thread • Replies: 28 • Updated: 2026-03-02 01:32 UTC

OP

Hyperliquid

>decentralized perp and spot exchange
>trading silver, gold and crude oil on weekends during a war
>genius level founders. Harvard, MIT and caltech.
>no vc funding from day 1
>31% geneis airdop tokens to users minting millionaires for early usrs.
>97% all platfrom fees spent and buy HYPE tokens from open market and sent to burned wallet.


Holding HYPE is comfy AF

Early replies (first 3)

61918612
>>61918597
Buy an ad.
CLEAN IT UP JANNIES

61918623
>>61918597
>Shilled by literally all of Twitter fags including scammers like Arthur
>Token not needed
Yeah, no.

61918628
>>61918623
why don't people say "stock not needed". its a crypto company and the coin is basically the stock.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61918695
>>61918623
The coin might not be needed but they use it to buy and burn 98% of the profits so number go up and it’s destined to sit in the top 5 by EOY

61918707
It probably has the best price action out there. And it's not listed on most major exchanges

>>61918695
Isn't hype used as gas for the hyperliquid chain?

61918832
>>61918623
hype is great. non kyc leverage trading??? plus it had a multitude of apps being built to take advantage of it from fully automated leverage trading apps like jest to shit like dreamcash. Claude being used on it too. its here to stay

61918837
>>61918832
More info about those apps? I thought it was only used for the hyperliquid exchange

61918843
>>61918597
Looks like asters butt plug.

61918925
>>61918597
shit volume on commodities
have fun getting adled
dot hl are insufferable fags

61919310
>>61918612
HYPEBTC has a nice bullflag setup

61919323
>>61918623
>token not needed

All 97% of all fees generated by the Hyperliquid exchange is used to buy HYPE tokens and gets sent to burn address.
$1.3 Billion is fees so far. All on chain.

0xfefefefefefefefefefefefefefefefefefefefe

61919354
>>61919323
Is the hype token used as gas for the chain?

61919376
Fuck hyperliquid, they forced cz the good guy to giganuke the market (like he did in 2022 to destroy ftx/sbf), but these fuckers are still alive.
They need to disappear so cz can allow the market to recover.

61919383
>>61919376
I don't hold any hype but I use the exchange on a daily basis and it works better than even centralized exchanges. It's the best product out there.

61919391
>>61919354
Yes. Hype is used as gas on the HyperEVM chain.

There are two chains in Hyperliquid ecosystem.

HyperCore - trading engine. No gas needed. Pay with trading fees which is used to buy and burn HYPE.

HyperEVM - smart-contract layer. HYPE used as bas.

61920112
I was thinking about grabbing a bag in late Jan and then it pumped again. Serves me right for wanting to buy this under 20 burgerbux

61920124
>>61920112
Same, bro. I just hold btc and trade on hyperliquid. I wanted to get myself a good back of hype, it's the best project out there and the team are not niggers. They want hype to go up. This weekends pump is because everybody is using it to trade crypto and commodities.

One of the few chains that is actually used. No marketing, no bullshit kantian philosophy or any kind of german idealism talk like Sergey or Charles hoskinson

61920169
How do I even buy Hype in the US? I need to use a VPN?

61920469
>>61919376

61920537
can i trade spot btc on there?

61920572
>>61920537
yes. Crypto, stocks, commodities... both spot and perps

61920574
Forex too

61921651
>>61920169
it's on Coinbase now starting Feb 2026. Not sure if it's available in USA.

VPN is very useful. expressvpn

61921686
Funny , this thread popped up because hype's about the moon

61921966
>>61918612
tell that to bloomberg you stupid nigger

61921981
>>61918623
>hurr im not going to buy this multi-billion marketcap token because [insert random person i dont like] is in it!!!
You are thinking like a pleb here and will simply miss out on profits this way.

61922017
>>61918597
I only have 250 hype and refuse to buy up here. It has to retrace back to the low 20's at some point.

Also shilling hype here is a waste. This entire board is so underwater on their bags they're in the mariana trenches.
>Link generals
>Avi generals
>BBBY/GME

I said this to myself earlier this year but Jeff and Vitalik are truly the last 2 people in this entire fucking space that still hasn't soul their souls yet

61922034
>>61921981

item.title: So Tradingview is over $400 US a month if you want to see 1 min charts? — 27 replies — 2.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
So Tradingview is over $400 US a month if you want to see 1 min charts?

Open thread • Replies: 27 • Updated: 2026-03-02 01:11 UTC

OP

So Tradingview is over $400 US a month if you want to see 1 min charts? I was told I need Ultimate, where can you see and trade 1 min charts for free or cheaper than that?

Early replies (first 3)

61918479
$461 worth of product but they are willing to give it to you for free for 1 month, thats a $461 giveaway.

61918533
>>61918479
Even free tradingview has minute charts, you have to go up to premium if you want seconds based intervals. I don't know where your getting that price from. I'm showing $240 for ultimate if you go with the most expensive billed monthly option. But if you seriously want tradingview, get whatever minimum plan you can stand until black friday, that's when they have their once a year huge sale on annual plans.

61918574
>>61918474
Trading view sucks so much it's unreal. No wonder topstep made their own trading platform.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61918578
>>61918474
imagine paying $400 a month to see 1m charts when you could just $400 long

61918579
>trading 1 min charts

utterly pointless lol

61918641
>>61918474
>>61918479
>>61918533
>>61918574
>>61918578
>Paying for something that is free

do retards really lmao

anything below 4hours is for retards anyway

61918644
>>61918474
>15 watchlist alerts
>ability to BUY professional market data

61918648
>>61918579
>>61918641
You stupid faggots realize that a lot of people make hundreds of thousands or millions of dollars a year trading nothing but 1 - 5 minute charts right?

61918660
>>61918648
no they dont

61918681
>>61918648
proof?

61918744
>>61918660
>>61918681
Lmao, sheltered retards... why are you on /biz? Fabio Valentini is considered one of the current best traders in the world and trades strictly on one and five minute charts. He is one among thousands... you guys are so fucking clueless it's embarrassing. Don't talk about trading ever again.

61918761
>>61918744
>saaar please pay $500 for trading view saaar need more indicators and 1 minute chart to be good trader

kek you fool

61918799
>>61918761
I get 1 minute amd any timeframe charts for free on my trading platform, don't need or use trading view nor do I give any fucks if somebody pays them or not. Did you want to address how wrong and uninformed you are about scalping and traders who make more in a year than you will in your entire life on one minute time frames or shift goal posts even further?

61918807
>>61918648
and how many don't?

61918845
>>61918474
Tradingjew kek

61918847
>>61918641
Pay up tards!

61918850
>>61918744
I have seen many cex and another jew corpo shill on biz, but tv kek, we have reached rock bottom, iq wise.

61918997
>>61918474
Binance?

61919653
>>61918648
I trade the 1 nanosecond chart

61919657
>>61918474
you need pro to see 1 second charts, which costs 60/mo, but if you buy on holdays is only like 216/yr instead of 720. the ultimate tier is to see tick charts, which are very cool, but certainly not worth it for someone who makes this thread.

61919663
>>61918474
1-minute is available for free on my end just fine, just checked. I see the 2-minute, 10-minute, and sub-1-minute charts are all locked behind a subscription, which is the same case as it's always been.

61919664
>>61918474
What's the point of that? You get 1m charts for free, and 1m charts are kind of useless.

61919789
>>61919657
My broker shows the tape but it comes in blocks, not sure if it's because my computer/their javashit software sucks or if it's just the data limitation.
I got lucky scalping a few times but it always felt like luck, and if you're too slow you're now stuck "swing trading" a quickly losing position.

61919871
>>61919789
what platform? regardless check your quote speed, you may have different options like real time, 1 second delay and so on

61920118
>>61918648
yes sir we have the realize sar

61921849
>>61918474
is there an alternative for tradingview?

61921956
wow.. no one actually trades here huh...
market data is priced differently depending if you're a registered or work in a registered.. tl;dr ur part of the finance industry
you should not be paying more than $50 for everything you'd ever need in each trading region

btw.. yeah you need fast, realtime not-just-BATS charts for timing, and there's lost of info there too
